## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo build` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` no new warnings
- [ ] `pnpm build` (frontend) passes
- [ ] Manual testing done

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Self-reviewed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Migration added (if DB change)
